## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including any error messages or logs.

## Environment

- DeviceSDK version or commit:
- Deployment method (Docker, source, etc.):
- OS / architecture:
- Browser / CLI version (if relevant):

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or log excerpts here. If the issue involves
